briefs.title: B.C. Reg. 2/2026 Filed via Order in Council — Subject Matter Not Specified in Source
briefs.summary: A new British Columbia regulation (B.C. Reg. 2/2026) was filed under Order in Council 5/2026 and published January 27, 2026. The source provided does not include details about what this regulation covers or which businesses it affects.
briefs.action_required: Look up B.C. Reg. 2/2026 on the BC Laws website to confirm if it applies to your business.
